description: Focused top-10 author mining lane for immediate literary expansion of the AI dystopia quotes corpus.

records.name: Isaac Asimov
records.reason: Highest-yield canonical robot and machine-governance writer for this project.

records.name: Philip K. Dick
records.reason: Essential for android identity, machine paranoia, and human replacement themes.

records.name: Karel Capek
records.reason: Foundational robot-uprising writer and a central historical anchor.

records.name: Jack Williamson
records.reason: Critical for paternalistic machine control and humanoid overprotection.

records.name: Harlan Ellison
records.reason: Essential hostile-superintelligence writer with highly quotable language.

records.name: Frank Herbert
records.reason: Adjacent but crucial anti-machine civilizational thinker with quotable anti-computation language.

records.name: Arthur C. Clarke
records.reason: Canonical AI-computer fiction and broad mainstream recognizability.
